children.name: div
children.textContent: Arugula salad · Crusty bread · Pinot Grigio

children.name: div
children.textContent: Beat eggs with parmesan, salt and pepper in a bowl until fluffy.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Add leftover pasta and spread evenly in the pan.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Pour egg mixture over pasta. Cook undisturbed 4-5 min.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Flip carefully or finish under broiler for 2 min.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Garnish with fresh basil and serve immediately.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Real hacks from real home chefs

children.name: div
children.textContent: Tap to share your leftover wizardry

children.name: div
children.textContent: Blend leftover roasted veggies with stock for an instant gourmet soup — takes 5 minutes!

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-share2 lucide-share-2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="18" cy="5" r="3"/><circle cx="6" cy="12" r="3"/><circle cx="18" cy="19" r="3"/><line x1="8.59" x2="15.42" y1="13.51" y2="17.49"/><line x1="15.41" x2="8.59" y1="6.51" y2="10.49"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Stale bread? Cube it, toast with garlic oil, and you have croutons that beat any store brand.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-share2 lucide-share-2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="18" cy="5" r="3"/><circle cx="6" cy="12" r="3"/><circle cx="18" cy="19" r="3"/><line x1="8.59" x2="15.42" y1="13.51" y2="17.49"/><line x1="15.41" x2="8.59" y1="6.51" y2="10.49"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Cold pizza topped with a fried egg is genuinely life-changing. Don't knock it until you try it!

children.name: div
children.textContent: Leftover curry? Mix with coconut milk and simmer — instant Thai-inspired dish in 10 min.
